reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
동결건조식품으로 타상품의 북어만 주기적으로 주문했었는데 바잇미에서 포포트릿 동결식품이 우리 쪼꼬미들한테 좋은 고단백 저지방! 이라는 점과 필수 아미노산이 풍부하다고해서 주문해봤어요 그중에서도 말고기가 빈혈예방 및 관절예방에 좋다고해서 매일 밤 사냥놀이로 뛰어다니는 우리쪼꼬미한테 너무 좋을꺼같아서 말고기로 주문했습니다.
배송은 2-3일 정도로 빠르고 평소 입맛 까다로운 우리 쪼꼬미한테 주니 바로 와서 먹어 너무 만족했습니다😄 입맛까다로운 아이들도 잘먹을꺼같아 집사님들께 추천드립니다! 재구매하러올께요^^
reviews.content_en: I used to regularly order dried pollack from other brands, but I decided to try BITE ME's POPOJIRIT freeze-dried food because it's high-protein and low-fat for our little ones, and rich in essential amino acids! Among the options, I chose horse meat because it's good for preventing anemia and joint issues—perfect for our little guy who runs around hunting every night. Shipping was fast (2-3 days), and even though our pup is usually a picky eater, he came right over and ate it up! I'm so satisfied 😄 I think even picky eaters will enjoy this, so I highly recommend it to other pet parents! I'll be back to reorder ^^

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 말이 필요없네요   더 달라고 냥냥냥😽😽😽
reviews.content_en: No words needed 😽😽😽 asking for more nyanya~

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content:
소간이 강아지 눈물에 좋고 효과를 많이 봤다는 주변 지인들의 추천에 따라 구매하게 됐어요!!
다행히 저희 집 막내 곤쥬님께서 너무너무 잘 먹더라구요! 이 포포트릿 소간 동결건조 간식 먹고 눈물 자국이 좀 완화되기를 바랍니다🙏🏻
reviews.content_en: I ended up purchasing it based on recommendations from people around me who said beef liver is good for dogs' eye stains and they've seen great results!! Fortunately, our youngest Gonju absolutely loves it! I'm hoping that after eating this POPOJIRIT beef liver freeze-dried treat, her eye staining will improve 🙏🏻

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
작은아이는 입맛이 까다로운편인대 이걸 너무 잘먹구요
큰아이는 입맛이 까다로운편은 아닌데 안먹네오 평소에 먹질 않아서 그런건지 모르겠지만 그래두 작은애기가 잘먹어주어서 너무 좋아요
reviews.content_en: Our younger one is a picky eater, but she eats this really well. Our older one isn't usually picky, but he doesn't eat it—I'm not sure if it's because he doesn't normally eat this type of thing, but I'm just happy that the little one eats it well!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 저희 18살 묘르신이 요즘 북어만 드세요~ 어르신이라 저렇게 잘게 잘라서 사료랑 같이 드리면 맛있게 잡숫고, 한두시간 있다가 다시 또 달라 하시네요~ 사실 저도 몇번 먹어봤는데, 제가 먹어도 맛있더라구요~ ㅎㅎ 입맛 없으신 묘르신께 입맛 돌게 하는 맛인거 같아요~
reviews.content_en: Our 18-year-old Myowrson has been eating only dried pollack these days~ Since she's a senior, when I cut it up finely and give it with her regular food, she eats it deliciously, and then asks for more again after an hour or two~ Honestly, I've tried it a few times myself, and it tastes good even for me ㅎㅎ It seems like it's the kind of flavor that brings back appetite for a senior cat with no appetite~

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 가자미 동결간식 너무 좋아요. 가자미 고유의 구수한 냄새도 그대로 나고 쉽게 부서져서 우리 강아지가 잘 먹어요~^^
reviews.content_en: The flounder freeze-dried treats are amazing. You can smell the natural flounder aroma, and it crumbles easily so our pup eats it well~^^

reviews.name: 피****
reviews.content:
그냥 보면 딱딱해보이는데 하나도 안 딱딱하고 바삭하네요!
그냥 먹여도 되고, 물에 불려도 되고, 가루처럼 줘도 된대서 한 번 불려봤는데 확실히 뭔가 부드러워지긴 하네요.
물에 불려서 물이랑 같이 줬더니 물도 맛있어서 물 먼저 먹고 말고기 먹더라고요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 맛있는 물은 살면서 첨 먹어본듯
reviews.content_en: Looking at it, it seems hard and crunchy, but it's actually not hard at all—just crispy! You can give it as-is, soak it in water, or even give it as a powder, so I tried soaking it and it definitely softens a bit. When I soaked it in water and gave it with the water, he ate the water first because it tasted good, then ate the horse meat ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ Tasty water—I think this is the first time I'm experiencing this in my life!

reviews.name: e****
reviews.content:
샘플 먹여보고 잘 먹어서 본품 주문했어요.
샘플에 들은 크기보다 본품에 담긴 간식 크기가 살짝 더 커요^^ 
동결건조지만 딱딱하지 않고 소형견이 먹기에 좋은 식감이에요. 가자미 간식이 생소하지만 성분도 좋고 저칼로리 간식이라 울 강쥐에게 딱입니다~
reviews.content_en: I tried the sample and she ate it well, so I ordered the full product. The treat pieces in the full product are slightly bigger than in the sample ^^ Although it's freeze-dried, it's not hard and has a nice texture for small dogs to eat. Flounder treats are unfamiliar, but the ingredients are great and it's a low-calorie treat, so it's perfect for our pup~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
소간이 아이들한테 좋다고해서 
품절 풀리자마자 구매햇어요! 
기호성도 좋구 아이들이 너무 좋아해서 
다 먹이고 재구매하려구요^^
reviews.content_en: I heard beef liver is good for kids, so I bought it as soon as stock became available! The palatability is great and the kids love it so much that I'll be reordering once they finish it ^^

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
입맛 까다로운 아인데 그르릉 거리면서 진짜
잘먹어요!
reviews.content_en: My pup is a picky eater, but she eats this really well while making little happy growling sounds!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 엄청 딱딱하지도 않고 애기가 엄청 잘먹구 조아해요!
reviews.content_en: It's not overly hard at all and my pup loves it so much! 😊

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 배송 도착하자마자 미친듯이 달려들어요,, 맛있나봐요 ㅎㅎㅎ 아주아주 뿌듯합니다! 어디 외출할때 들고다니기 좋은 크기인 것 같아요 ! 간편하게 먹일 수 있고 가방에 쏙 들어갈 크기 ! 다음번엔 한번에 왕창사서 쟁여두려구요 :)
reviews.content_en: As soon as it arrived, he went crazy for it,, must be delicious haha 😄 I'm so happy! It seems like a great size to carry around when we go out! Easy to feed and fits perfectly in a bag! Next time I'm gonna stock up and buy a bunch at once :)

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content: 강쥐가 아직 어려서 간식을 처음 구매해요~ 어떤걸 살까 고민하다가 포포트릿 가자미랑 소간으로 선택했어요 :) 가자미부터 먹이고 먹일려고 아직 소간은 안먹여봤는데 가자미처럼 잘 먹었으면 좋겠어요 눈물이 좀 나는 편이라 눈물에도 효과가 있었으면 좋겠어요 다 잘먹으면 다음에 또 구매각입니다^^
reviews.content_en: My pup is still young so this is my first time buying treats~ I was thinking about which one to get, and I decided on BITE ME pollock and beef liver :) I've started feeding him the pollock first and haven't tried the beef liver yet, but I hope he eats it as well as the pollock. He tends to have teary eyes so I hope this helps with that too. If he eats it all well, I'll definitely buy again next time^^

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content: 강쥐가 아직 어려서 간식을 처음 구매해요~ 어떤걸 살까 고민하다가 후기보고 포포트릿 가자미로 선택했어요 :) 원물 그대로 건조한거라고 하니 믿음이 가네요 오늘 처음 줘봤는데 냄새가 슝슝 나서 그런지 엄청 좋아하면서 잘먹네요 첫간식 성공입니다! 다 먹으면 또 구매할려구요!
reviews.content_en: My pup is still young so this is my first time buying treats~ I was wondering which one to pick, and after reading reviews I chose BITE ME pollock :) Since it's just the raw ingredient dried naturally, I feel confident about it. I gave it to him for the first time today and because of the strong smell, he absolutely loves it and eats it so well! First treat success! Once he finishes it, I'm definitely buying again!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 이거 대박이에요ㅜㅜ 사기 전엔 좀 비싸다고 생각했는데 먹여보니까 영양도 많은 것 같고 크기도 적당해서 하나씩 두개씩 급여하기 좋은 것 같습니다^^ 훈련시킬 때 하나씩 들고 있으면 환장하더라고요ㅋㅋ 잘 먹일게요~!
reviews.content_en: This is amazing!! 😭 Before buying it I thought it was a bit pricey, but after feeding it to him it seems really nutritious and the size is just right for giving one or two at a time^^ When I use them for training and hold one, he goes absolutely crazy for it lol Will feed it to him well~!

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content: 육류간식 알러지가 있어서 연어로 사 보았는데 아이가 넘 좋아해요~~♡
reviews.content_en: He has a meat treat allergy so I tried the salmon version and my boy absolutely loves it~~♡

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 유독 바잇미 가자미 트릿만 먹는 금동이를 위해 이번엔 4개랑 북어 2개랑 똥빽랑 이렇게 구매했어요~ 가자미 트릿을 너무 좋아해서 얼마나 맛있나 궁금해 먹어봤는데, 제 입맛엔 별로지만 금동인 이게 제일 맛있나봐요~ㅎㅎ 바잇미만의 귀염 터지는 패키지가 인테리어 효과까지 있는거 같아요! 2개 구매시 1개는 기부하신단 말씀에 절대 홀수로는 구매할수 없겠더라구요~ 그래서 간식도 사고 기부도 할수 있으니 재구매하러 또 오겠습니당~메리크리스마스에용
reviews.content_en: My Gemdong only eats BITE ME pollock treats, so this time I got 4 pollock treats, 2 dried pollack, and some pork skin treats~ He loves the pollock treats so much that I was curious how tasty they were so I tried one, but they're not really my taste haha But for Gemdong they must be the most delicious~ㅎㅎ BITE ME's adorable packaging even has an interior design effect! I heard that when you buy 2, 1 gets donated, so I absolutely can't buy an odd number~ That way I can both buy treats and contribute to donations, so I'll be back for more!~ Merry Christmas~

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 저희집 고영이가 참 좋아해서 안 떨어지게 쟁여놓고 있는 간식입니다 어린이날을 맞이해서 강아지 친구들한테도 선물했는데 참 좋아한대요 뿌-덧
reviews.content_en: My Goyoung really loves it so I always keep a stash of these treats. For Children's Day I also gave it to his doggy friends and they loved it too~ So happy!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 원래 소간 잘 먹는데 동결건조된 걸로 사봤어요!! 바삭바삭 먹는 소리 너무 좋네요..ㅋㅋㅋ 크기도 적당하고 훈련용으로 주기에 좋을 것 같아요!ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: He already eats regular beef liver well, but this time I tried the freeze-dried version!! The crunchy sound when he eats it is so satisfying..ㅋㅋㅋ The size is just right and it seems perfect for training treats!ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content: 칭찬용으로 하나씩 주기 넘 좋아요 맛있는지 금방 삼켜 버려요 양도 많네요
reviews.content_en: It's so great for giving as praise one at a time. He swallows it right away because it's so tasty! And there's quite a lot of it

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 간식을 여러 종류로 주고 싶어서 바잇미 간식을 처음 주문해봤는데 의심 많은 첫째냥이도 냄새 맡자마자 바로 먹고 둘째냥이도 너무 좋아해요! 가자미를 가장 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: I ordered BITE ME treats for the first time because I wanted to give my cats various snacks, and my suspicious first cat started eating right away after smelling it, and my second cat loves it too! She loves the flatfish flavor the most.

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
거의 한달째 먹이고 있는데 양이 넉넉해서 좋아요 ㅎㅎ
다음번에는 다른 맛으로도 시켜볼거예요
reviews.content_en: I've been feeding it for almost a month and I love that the portion is generous haha. I'll try a different flavor next time!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
작고 부드러워서 
치아 약한 멍멍이도 먹기 편하겠어요^^
튼실한 저희 댕댕이는 맛있게 아주 잘 먹습니다~
reviews.content_en: It's small and soft, so even my pup with weak teeth can eat it easily ^^ My sturdy pup eats it deliciously all the time~

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
알러지가 많아서 재료가 눈에 보이는걸 좋아해요.
이번에 이거말고 여러개 샀는데 달 잘먹어요ㅎㅎ! 자기껀쥴 알아서 박스 뜯을때부터 난리네요ㅎㅎ 
강아지가 너무 좋아해서 기분 좋아요💛
reviews.content_en: Since my dog has a lot of allergies, I like that I can see the ingredients. I bought several other flavors this time too, and my dog eats them so well haha! He's so excited that he already tears open the box before I even open it haha. I'm happy because my dog loves it so much 💛

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 안녕하세요 콩순이예요🤎🤍 저희 애기가 육류에 알러지가 있어요ㅠ 닭인지 칠면조인지 돼지인지 소인지 아직 알지는 못하지만... 육류로 만들어진 사료먹고 눈물이 터지고 발사탕을 했거든요. 현재 사료도 어류가 주원료인걸로 먹이고 있어서 간식도 어류 동결건조 먹여보려고 구매했구요~~ 너무너무너뮤 잘먹습니다! 냄새가 역한 생선냄새가 아니라 약간 쥐포? 냄새와 비슷하게 나서 간식 줄때도 부담없구요, 입냄새도 안나용~ 포장도 잘 되어있고 기호성도 좋네요 ㅎㅎ 담에는 다른 맛(?)으로도 구매해보려구요! 잘 먹이겠습니다~💛💛
reviews.content_en: Hi, this is Kongsuni 🤎🤍 My baby has a meat allergy. I'm not sure if it's chicken, turkey, pork, or beef yet... but after eating meat-based food, my dog had watery eyes and paw inflammation. We're currently feeding fish-based kibble, so I purchased this fish freeze-dried treat to try~ She eats it SO well! The smell isn't that strong fishy smell, but more like dried squid(?) so it's easy to give treats, and no bad breath~ The packaging is great and she really likes it haha. Next time I'll try a different flavor(?)! I'll feed it well~ 💛💛

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
💛바잇미 동결건조 트릿 4년 사용 후기❤️
바잇미 트릿 먹고 자라 집사보다 건강한 13살 할배냥들입니다~
기호성 말할 것도 없고,원물 100프로로 만들어져 믿고 안심하고 급여합니다. 4년째 매일 먹어도 항상 처음 접했던 그 순간처럼 맛있게 드십니다 ^^
리뷰 처음 남기는거 같은데 리뷰도 안쓰고 sns도 안하는 게으른 집사도 잊지않고 신경써주셔서 감사해요:)
buy2 give1 취지에 반해 주문하고 품질에 반해 재주문한지 벌써 몇해가 흘렀네요. 그동안 더 많이 사랑 받는 바잇미 보며 제가 괜히 기쁘고, 변치 않는 품질에 감사했어요^^
앞으로도 할배들을 자본과 사랑으로 키워 바잇미의 고인물 고양이들로 만드는 것이 목표입니다 홧팅! 😍
reviews.content_en:
💛 BITE ME Freeze-Dried Treats - 4 Year Review ❤️
Our 13-year-old senior boys grew up eating BITE ME treats and are healthier than their cat parent~ There's no need to even mention how much they love it, and I give it with confidence knowing it's made 100% from whole ingredients. Even after eating it every day for 4 years, they eat it just as deliciously as that very first moment they tried it ^^ This is probably my first review, and thank you for caring about this lazy cat parent who doesn't write reviews or use SNS :) It's been several years since I reordered based on the buy2 give1 purpose and the quality. Watching BITE ME get more love all this time makes me inexplicably happy, and I'm grateful for the consistent quality ^^ Going forward, my goal is to raise my senior boys with dedication and love to make them loyal BITE ME cats! Fighting! 😍

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 안 먹었던 연어라 잘 먹을꺼라 믿고 주문했어요.부서진거 없이 배송 상태 좋아요~
reviews.content_en: Since my cat hadn't tried salmon before, I ordered with confidence that she'd eat it. The shipping condition is perfect with no broken pieces~

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
아이가 너무너무  잘 먹어요 ~   사이즈도  앙증 맞게  딱 먹기 좋은  사이즈라  아이들이  막기도 편하규  말랑 말랑 해서  선으로 부서트려 사료에 삮아줘도  아주 잘 묵어요
노견인 아이가 먹기  편한거  같아요
reviews.content_en: My baby eats it SO much~ The size is just right and easy for the kids to grab, and it's soft so even if I crumble it with a string and mix it with kibble, he eats it really well. It seems easy for my senior dog to eat!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
양 조금 작네유! 가격도 조금 낮추면 좋을듯😊🤍
북어트릿이랑 습식사료랑 같이 먹는데 아주
잘먹어요👍🏻 물에 적셔서 주면 음수량도 늘리고
최고! 최고🎄✨
reviews.content_en: The portion is a bit small! It would be nice if the price could be lowered a bit too 😊🤍 My dog eats it very well with dried pollack treats and wet food 👍🏻 When I soak it in water, it also increases water intake - perfect! Perfect! 🎄✨

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 유통기한도 넉넉하고 먹기 좋게 너무 크지도 작지도않은 크기로 보관까지 신경쓴거같아 너무 만족스러워요^^ 특별간식으로 주기 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: The expiration date is plenty, and the size is just right - not too big, not too small - making it easy to eat and store. I'm very satisfied ^^ It's perfect for giving as a special treat!

reviews.name: 노****
reviews.content: 맛보기로 있다보니 뭐가 제일 잘먹나 보고 또 사려고 했건만, 전부 다 잘먹으니.. 이것은 어매의 지갑이 탈탈 털리는 소리가 들리는구나! 봉지를 꺼내자마자 나도 모르게 혓바닥부터 낼름거려지는 맛. 사이좋게 나눠먹고도 아쉬워 봉지까지 정복해야만 하는 그런 맛. ㅋㅋ 손쉽게 주기도 좋고 냄새맡아보니 거의 동해바다급 냄새가 남. 열번 시키세요 여러분.
reviews.content_en: Since it's a sampler pack, I wanted to see which one she'd eat best and buy that one, but she loves them all... I can practically hear my mom's wallet crying! 😂 The moment you open the bag, you can't help but drool—it's that good. Even after sharing fairly, we end up finishing the whole bag because we can't resist. It's so easy to give as a treat, and it smells almost like the East Sea! Order this ten times, everyone.

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
북어와 황태는 일맥상통한 간식이죠^^
동결건조해서 바식하니 먹이기 좋고 
일일이 물에 담궈 말리는 수고로움을 해결해주는 제품이네요.
짜지않고 강이지에게 최적화된  간식입니다
까까 달라고 오매불망 기다리는 모습이 사랑스럽네요♡
reviews.content_en: Pollock and dried Alaska pollock are treats that go hand in hand! 😊 Since it's freeze-dried, it's super convenient to serve, and it solves the hassle of having to soak and dry it yourself. It's not salty and perfectly formulated for pups. Love how my baby waits eagerly begging for more! ♡

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 트릿 크기가 어느정도일지 몰라서 걱정했는데 작은편이라 너무 맘에 들어요! 질기지 않고 바사삭 해서 고양이들도 넘 잘먹고 입맛에맞는지 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: I was worried about the treat size, but I'm so happy it's on the smaller side! It's not tough and has a nice crispy texture, so my cats eat it really well and clearly love the taste.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 건식은 처음 먹여보는건데 매우 잘 먹네요
reviews.content_en: It's the first time trying dry treats, and she eats it really well!

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
아가가 11살이라 먹이는것도 신경쓰는 편인데 동결건조니 마음놓고 먹여도 되지싶어서 구매했어요
엄청 맛있게 먹네요
그거면 재구매는 꼭 해야할듯요
다먹을때쯤 재구매하러 올께요
reviews.content_en: My baby is 11 years old, so I'm careful about what I feed her. Since it's freeze-dried, I felt confident giving it to her. She eats it so deliciously! I definitely need to repurchase. I'll be back to order more when she finishes this!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 보틀에 들어있어 보관하고 꺼내주기도 편해요! 패키지도 넘 기염뽀짝하고 저희집 강쥐도 넘 조아해요
reviews.content_en: It comes in a bottle so it's easy to store and dispense! The packaging looks so fancy and cute, and my pup loves it so much! 🐕

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 양이 적은거 말고는 크기도 적당하고 애들도 잘 먹습니다
reviews.content_en: Other than the quantity being a bit small, the size is just right and the kids eat it well.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 간이 강아지눈에 좋다고해서 두번째구매입니다 믿고먹여요 사료줄때 간식처럼 두개씩 넣어서 주니 더잘먹어요 평소에 눈물이 많은데 눈건강을 위해 영양제처럼주고있답니다 두살푸들이에요
reviews.content_en: I'm buying this for the second time because liver is good for dogs' eyes. I feed it with confidence—when I give kibble, I add two pieces like a treat and she eats even better! She usually has watery eyes, but I'm giving this like a supplement for eye health. She's a 2-year-old Poodle. 💕

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 일단 잘먹어서 좋으네요 처음 개봉할때 잘 안떨어져서 불편했습니다 사료에 부숴서 토핑으로 뿌려주면 잘먹어요 기호성 좋아서 맘에 들지만 개봉할때 조금 편리하면 좋겠습니다
reviews.content_en: First of all, it's great that she eats it well, but it was inconvenient that it didn't come out easily when I first opened it. When I crush it and sprinkle it as a topping on her food, she eats it great! I really like how palatable it is, but it would be better if it were easier to open.

reviews.name: 방****
reviews.content: 엄청 좋아해요 조그맣고 부드러워 간식으로 주기 좋아해
reviews.content_en: She absolutely loves it! It's small and soft, so it's perfect as a treat! 🐶

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
잘먹어요
동결건조라 걱정없이 먹여도 되지않을까 싶어 구매했어요
우리 아가가 잘먹으니 흐뭇하고 보고 있으니 행복이네요
다 먹일때쯤 재구매하러 올께요
reviews.content_en: She eats it well 😊 I bought it because I thought it would be safe to feed her since it's freeze-dried. I'm so happy watching our baby eat it well. I'll be back to reorder when we finish this one!

reviews.name: 초****
reviews.content:
좋아요 배송도 빨랐습니다 :)
무엇보다 아이들이 잘먹어요
처음 말고기 먹여봤는데 맛있나봐요ㅋㅋ
적당히 부서지고 부드러워서그런지 더 잘 먹는 느낌이예요
reviews.content_en: Love it, and shipping was fast too :) Most importantly, the kids eat it really well. This was our first time trying horse meat, and she seems to love it haha. It crumbles just right and has a soft texture, so she eats it even better!

reviews.name: 초****
reviews.content:
좋아요 배송도 빨랐습니다 :)
무엇보다 아이들이 잘먹어요
처음 말고기 먹여봤는데 맛있나봐요ㅋㅋ
적당히 부서지고 부드러워서그런지 더 잘 먹는 느낌이예요
reviews.content_en: Love it, and shipping was fast too :) Most importantly, the kids eat it really well. This was first time trying horse meat, and she seems to love it haha. It crumbles just right and has a soft texture, so she eats it even better!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
알러지가 있는 우리댕댕이가 먹는 간식입니다
사료위에 잘라서  토핑처럼 올려주기도하고
이쁜짓할때 간식으로 줍니다
아주 좋아하고 잘먹어요
reviews.content_en: This is a treat for our pup who has allergies. I cut it up and sprinkle it on top of her food like a topping, and I also give it to her as a reward for being a good girl. She absolutely loves it and eats it so well!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 닭가슴살이 시루의 최애 간식이라 닭가슴살100프로 라고 해서 샀어요! 역시 이거에 제일 먼저 관심을 보이네요💛
reviews.content_en: Chicken breast is Siru's favorite treat, so I got this because it says 100% chicken breast! As expected, she's most interested in this one first 💛

reviews.name: 함****
reviews.content: 맛있어용~ 으헝~ 넘 맛있쪄용,.. 너 한개 나 세개,.. ㅋㅋㅋ 맛이 어떤가 싶어서 한개 맛봤다가 울 고양이보담 제가 더 먹어요,..ㅋㅋ 뒷끝에 남는 고소함과 신선한 이 맛.. 뭐죠?! 지난번에도 거진 제가 다 먹어버리고 이번에도 요거밖에 않남았네용,..ㅠ 울 쥰이한테 넘 미안하지만 그래도 맛있는 걸 어째요..ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: It's delicious~~ *nom nom* It's SO yummy.. You get one, I get three haha. I was curious about the taste so I tried one piece and ended up eating more than my cat does.. The lingering savory flavor and that fresh taste.. what is it?! Last time I ate almost all of it too and this time I barely left any for Joon.. I feel so bad for my Joon but what can I do when it's this tasty haha

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
강아지가 좋아하는거라 구입했어요~
더 저렴한 북어도 많지만 왠지 바잇미에서만 구입하게 되네요
크기나 용량이 맘에 들어요
reviews.content_en: I bought it because my dog loves it~ There are cheaper dried pollack options out there, but for some reason I keep buying from BITE ME. I really like the size and amount!

reviews.name: 하****
reviews.content:
너무 잘먹어요.
아이가 소고기를 잘먹어서 소고기 있나 보니 없어서 ,
말고기로 구매해봤는데 너무 좋아해서 구매한 보람이 있네요.
가격은 좀 비싼편인데 아이가 잘 먹어줘서 만족합니다
reviews.content_en: She eats it really well. My pup usually likes beef, and I didn't see any available, so I tried horse meat instead and she loves it so much it was worth the purchase. The price is a bit steep, but I'm satisfied since she eats it so well!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 티니보다 큰거 주면 꼭꼭 잘 씹어먹어서 일반 크기로 구매했어요! 부드러운 편이고 냄새도 고소해서 잘 먹네요
reviews.content_en: When I gave her something bigger than Tiny size, she chewed it really well, so I ordered the regular size! It's pretty soft and smells savory, so she eats it nicely!

reviews.name: 심****
reviews.content:
소간 좋아하는 간식이라 바잇미에서 재구매합니다!!
배송빠르고 프로모션 덕분에 저렴하게 구매합니다
reviews.content_en: She loves beef liver treats, so I'm reordering from BITE ME!! Shipping is fast and I get it at a good price thanks to their promotions!
